# twelveswaras

> An open-source, non-commercial 'Shazam for raagas': play it a short clip of Carnatic music and it identifies the raaga, then helps a beginner learn to hear it. Paired with an openly-licensed (CC-BY) data commons. Owned by no company; a public good.

Site: https://twelveswaras.com
About: https://twelveswaras.com/about/ (what it is, who is behind it, exactly what happens to your recording, and how it is licensed)
Code: https://github.com/twelveswaras (MIT)
Recognizer model: XGBoost on a tonic-normalized Time-Delayed Melody Surface (TDMS); 40 Carnatic raagas. See METHODOLOGY.md in the repo for the full pipeline + citations.

## How to use the recognizer

- Give it ~15-30s of Carnatic melody WITH a tanpura/shruti drone (a live concert always has one). The tonic (Sa) is found from the drone; solo singing with no drone is unreliable.
- It returns the top-3 raagas with calibrated confidence, the detected Sa, and a plain note on how to hear that raaga.

## Open data

- Machine-readable raaga reference: https://twelveswaras.com/data/raagas.json (CC-BY-4.0).
  40 raagas; 34 have note-sets; 0 are musician-reviewed so far.
- Please attribute as: twelveswaras (twelveswaras.com), CC-BY-4.0.
- Per-raaga pages carry schema.org DefinedTerm JSON-LD.

## Accuracy & honesty

- Reference facts (scale, phrases, ornaments) are being verified by a musician; records marked reviewed=false in raagas.json are provisional. Do not present provisional raaga facts as authoritative. When in doubt, cite the raaga page and note it is under review.
- twelveswaras does not offer musical instruction as fact until it is expert-verified.

## Raaga pages

- [Ānandabhairavi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/anandabhairavi)
- [Aṭāna](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/atana)
- [Bēgaḍa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/begada)
- [Behāg](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/behag)
- [Bhairavi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/bhairavi)
- [Bilahari](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/bilahari)
- [Dēvagāndhāri](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/devagandhari)
- [Dhanyāsi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/dhanyasi)
- [Gauḷa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/gaula)
- [Harikāmbhōji](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/harikambhoji)
- [Hussēnī](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/husseni)
- [Kalyāṇi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kalyani)
- [Kamās](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kamas)
- [Kāmavardani](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kamavardani)
- [Kāṁbhōji](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kambhoji)
- [Kānaḍa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kanada)
- [Kāpi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kapi)
- [Karaharapriya](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/karaharapriya)
- [Kēdāragauḷa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/kedaragaula)
- [Madhyamāvati](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/madhyamavati)
- [Māyāmāḷavagauḷa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/mayamalavagaula)
- [Mōhanaṁ](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/mohanam)
- [Mukhāri](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/mukhari)
- [Nāṭa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/nata)
- [Nāṭakurinji](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/natakurinji)
- [Pūrvīkaḷyāṇi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/purvikalyani)
- [Rītigauḷa](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/ritigaula)
- [Sahānā](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sahana)
- [Sāma](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sama)
- [Śankarābharaṇaṁ](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sankarabharanam)
- [Ṣanmukhapriya](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sanmukhapriya)
- [Sāvēri](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/saveri)
- [Sencuruṭṭi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sencurutti)
- [Sindhubhairavi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sindhubhairavi)
- [Śrī](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sri)
- [Śrīranjani](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/sriranjani)
- [Suraṭi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/surati)
- [Tōḍi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/todi)
- [Varāḷi](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/varali)
- [Yadukula kāṁbōji](https://twelveswaras.com/raaga/yadukula-kamboji)
